name: Volyn Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the historic colour of the Volhynian banner
the silver cross of Volhynia and the central canton

description: A red field with a large white cross in the upper hoist quadrant — the historic Volhynian cross — and a white cogwheel / sun device in the centre of the canton.
history: Adopted as the official flag of Volyn Oblast. The white cross on red is the historic emblem of Volhynia (Volyn), in use since the medieval principality.

features.role: Volhynian sun in the centre of the cross
